# v0.8 External Review Report

Status: prepared, not completed

## Scope

This report will summarize external reviewer feedback for v0.8.

## Current State

No external review has been completed yet.

## Required Inputs

- completed feedback forms
- `feedback-log.csv` entries
- reviewer decision notes
- proposed follow-up actions

## Important Boundary

External feedback does not automatically upgrade candidate models. Candidate model promotion still requires source evidence, verification, and explicit model-status review.
